highlights.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/10 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 28 points and the Cleveland Cavaliers took control in the second half for a 146-134 victory over Minnesota on Saturday that snapped the Timberwolves' four-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Donovan Mitchell scores 28 points as Cavaliers beat Timberwolves 146-134

highlights.headline: Miami Heat vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Miami Heat vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/11 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Andrew Nembhard had 29 points and nine assists, Aaron Nesmith added 12 points and nine rebounds before an early exit and the Indiana Pacers routed the Miami Heat 123-99 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Andrew Nembhard scores 29 to help the Pacers beat the Heat 123-99 for a rare 2nd straight victory

highlights.description: LA Clippers vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LA Clippers vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights) 2026/01/11 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 26 points and John Collins added 25 as the Los Angeles Clippers rallied to beat the short-handed Detroit Pistons 98-92 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard, Collins and Harden power Clippers to comeback win over Pistons, 98-92

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Boston Celtics

highlights.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
highlights.description: San Antonio Spurs vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (San Antonio Spurs vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2026/01/11 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama scored 16 of his 21 points in the second half, including a game-sealing jumper with 19.2 seconds left, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Boston Celtics 100-95 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama and Fox each score 21 points in Spurs' 100-95 win over Celtics

headlines.description: — Coby White scored 22 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 20 and the Chicago Bulls beat the Dallas Mavericks 125-107 on Saturday night to snap a three-game losing streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bulls beat Mavericks 125-107 after Kidd is ejected in the first quarter

headlines.description: — Brandon Miller scored 18 points, LaMelo Ball had 17 and the Charlotte Hornets built a 47-point lead in the first half of a 150-95 rout against the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hornets build a 47-point lead in the 1st half and rout the Jazz 150-95
